name: Siteminder Limited
analysis: SDR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.7800, stop A$3.3759, target A$4.4200 (1.58:1) — then trail it.
